languages.original_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

languages.text: "Это не предмет. И не существо. Это — осколок древности, побежденной и заточенной, но все еще неизмеримо опасной для примитивных варваров вроде вас. Ты осознаешь всю меру моей правоты, когда лично узришь ее".

"It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."
languages.original_text: "Это не предмет. И не существо. Это — осколок древности, побежденной и заточенной, но все еще неизмеримо опасной для примитивных варваров вроде вас. Ты осознаешь всю меру моей правоты, когда лично узришь ее".

traits.locale_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

"It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

"It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

languages.text: «No es un objeto, pero tampoco es una criatura. Es un fragmento de una época ancestral, derrotado y aprisionado, pero aún supone un peligro inimaginable para bárbaros primitivos como vosotros. Comprenderás la verdad de mis palabras cuando te encuentres en su presencia».
languages.original_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

traits.locale_text: «No es un objeto, pero tampoco es una criatura. Es un fragmento de una época ancestral, derrotado y aprisionado, pero aún supone un peligro inimaginable para bárbaros primitivos como vosotros. Comprenderás la verdad de mis palabras cuando te encuentres en su presencia».

languages.text: “那不是个物件，也不是生物。那是一块远古时代的碎片，曾被击败、遭到囚禁，但对你们这种原始生物来说，仍然极其危险。等你亲眼见到，自然就会明白我说的一点不假。”
languages.original_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

traits.locale_text: “那不是个物件，也不是生物。那是一块远古时代的碎片，曾被击败、遭到囚禁，但对你们这种原始生物来说，仍然极其危险。等你亲眼见到，自然就会明白我说的一点不假。”

languages.text: « Il ne s'agit ni d'un objet ni d'une créature. C'est un fragment d'une époque ancienne, vaincu et emprisonné, mais toujours incommensurablement dangereux pour des barbares primitifs tels que vous. Vous constaterez que je n'exagère en rien lorsque vous le verrez de vos yeux. »
languages.original_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

traits.locale_text: « Il ne s'agit ni d'un objet ni d'une créature. C'est un fragment d'une époque ancienne, vaincu et emprisonné, mais toujours incommensurablement dangereux pour des barbares primitifs tels que vous. Vous constaterez que je n'exagère en rien lorsque vous le verrez de vos yeux. »

languages.text: "O bir nesne değil. Bir yaratık da değil. Kadim bir çağdan kalma, mağlup edilmiş ve hapsedilmiş ancak senin gibi ilkel barbarlar için hâlâ ölçülemez derecede tehlikeli bir parça. Onu bizzat gördüğünde sözlerimin tüm gerçekliğini anlayacaksın."
languages.original_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

traits.locale_text: "O bir nesne değil. Bir yaratık da değil. Kadim bir çağdan kalma, mağlup edilmiş ve hapsedilmiş ancak senin gibi ilkel barbarlar için hâlâ ölçülemez derecede tehlikeli bir parça. Onu bizzat gördüğünde sözlerimin tüm gerçekliğini anlayacaksın."

languages.text: "Es ist kein Gegenstand. Und auch keine Kreatur. Es ist eine Scherbe einer frühen Epoche, verschwunden und gefangen, aber für primitive Barbaren wie dich noch immer unsagbar gefährlich. Du wirst die ganze Wahrheit meiner Worte erkennen, wenn du ihm persönlich gegenüberstehst."
languages.original_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist kein Gegenstand. Und auch keine Kreatur. Es ist eine Scherbe einer frühen Epoche, verschwunden und gefangen, aber für primitive Barbaren wie dich noch immer unsagbar gefährlich. Du wirst die ganze Wahrheit meiner Worte erkennen, wenn du ihm persönlich gegenüberstehst."

languages.text: 「それは物体でも生き物でもない。古代の時代から来た破片で、打ち負かされ捕らえられたが、それでも原始的な蛮族であるお前たちには、計り知れない危険をもたらす。」
languages.original_text: "It is not an object. Nor is it a creature. It is a shard from an ancient epoch, vanquished and imprisoned, but still immeasurably dangerous to primitive barbarians like you. You will realise the full truth of my words when you behold it in person."

traits.locale_text: 「それは物体でも生き物でもない。古代の時代から来た破片で、打ち負かされ捕らえられたが、それでも原始的な蛮族であるお前たちには、計り知れない危険をもたらす。」
